problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: Combining Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
